title: Viking Armory
description: Changes model and texture of base minecraft armor to viking styled armor
body:
# This resource pack turns Minecraft armor into detailed Viking based armor.
### Changes
**Leather Armor** becomes more accurate version of armor (with the exception of chestplate). 

  **Iron Armor** becomes a **lamellar armor** with **Copper Armor** being **rusted** version of it. Their helmet is basic northern helmet with chainmail hanging of sides
  
  The **Chainmail Armor** starts looking more like armor and less like just a gray mesh
  
  Meanwhile **Gold Armor** turns into **ritual wear** you dont want to bring to combat and turning rusty and cracked when undead creature wears it. 
  
  **Diamond Armor** turns into a **scale armor** with protection of your entire body and helmet from iron armor set having its chainmail cover your entire face and spreading to chestplate 
  
  **Netherite Armor** on the other hand changes into unrealistic but cool armor ispired by For Honor Raider.
  
#    Resource pack was made thanks to [lukidonu](https://modrinth.com/user/lukidonu)'s [Armory Conglomery](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/armory-conglomery) and requires [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) and [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) to work! 
![EMF](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a07d72613d8c20b47c6f49efcab238e870e9efa.png)         ![ETF](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1d4608f18fc00ca5e9da67f3213c436a24b0d5d8.png)
